summary: Implemented live Windows Site binding for the Operator Console: console control now uses WindowsSiteControlClient, console attention reads real Site observation data, focused tests were added, and operator-console documentation now records current live support boundaries.

verification.command: pnpm --filter @narada2/windows-site exec vitest run test/unit/router.test.ts test/unit/aggregation.test.ts test/unit/observability.test.ts

known_residuals: Multi-scope resolution uses the first scope from config; future work should search all scopes for the target.
Cloudflare Site live binding remains deferred to an HTTP-based control client and endpoint discovery task.
Credential requirements are currently derived from auth_failed health status; a richer credential-requirements table may be needed later.
